DEMO_ID_SQNC_NUM Demonstration sequence number NUM 3 4
DEMO_ID_NUM DEMO_ID_NUM Demonstration number CHAR 2 5
DEMO_INFO_TXT DEMO_INFO_TXT Demo information text CHAR 15 6
1 Number shown on the matrix indicates the sequence of the data field. In 2025, the field for beneficiary sex was removed because it is available in the Master Beneficiary Summary File;
the numbering of the fields was updated.
2 Fields that are new since the February 2018 update.
3 New fields added in January 2021.
5 New fields
